B2B growth system

We build the system behind your growth

We design the structure that connects strategy, data, CRM, automation and pipeline so marketing and sales operate with clarity.

01

Friction

Growth feels unpredictable when the system behind it is unclear

Most growth problems are not caused by missing tools. They come from data, process, teams and reporting running without one architecture.

01

CRM fields without logic

02

Leads without real prioritization

03

Dashboards that do not guide decisions

04

Marketing and sales measuring different things

02

System layers

We build structured B2B growth systems

Rotata turns tools like HubSpot, ZoomInfo, La Growth Machine and Synapsale into an operating infrastructure focused on outcomes.

CRM architecture

Data model, lifecycle stages, pipelines and reporting designed around the real sales process.

Sales automation

Workflows that reduce friction, keep follow-up consistent and connect marketing with sales.

Account intelligence

Data, signals and intent used to prioritize accounts with a higher chance of moving forward.

Outbound system

Targeting, sequences, messaging and measurement so prospecting is not improvised.

03

Operating model

What your growth system includes

Strategy, data, CRM, automation, outbound, reporting and optimization work as one sequence: tool → system → outcome.

01

Data model and segmentation

02

Pipeline and lifecycle stages

03

Automation and handoffs

04

Business dashboards

05

Demand, nurturing and outbound

06

Continuous performance review

04

Execution rhythm

How we work

We diagnose the current structure, design the system, implement it and optimize it through shared metrics.

  1. 01Diagnose
  2. 02Design
  3. 03Implement
  4. 04Optimize
05

Impact readout

Built for measurable outcomes

We do not invent results. We design the system to measure conversion, velocity, lead quality, sales efficiency and pipeline contribution.

01

Clearer pipeline

02

More reliable data

More consistent follow-up

Faster decisions

HubSpot

Informe HubSpot State of Marketing 2026: tendencias clave en marketing B2B

HubSpot
